## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps To Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 🌐 Environment

- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 120]
- **OS**: [e.g., macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Extension Version**: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- **Firebase Console URL**: [if relevant]

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🔍 Console Logs

If applicable, paste any error messages from:

- Browser DevTools Console (F12)
- Extension popup console (right-click icon → Inspect popup)

```
Paste console logs here
```

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have checked existing issues
- [ ] I have included all relevant information
- [ ] I have tested on the latest version
- [ ] I have included console logs (if applicable)
